subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, that through His divine grace thou hast attained, and turned thy face toward the Most Exalted Horizon. We beseech the True One, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت الهی فائز شدی و بافق اعلی توجه نمودی از حق جل جلاله میطلبیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
